core_finding: Qwen is a Chinese-first model that has learned English to a high level — not an English model that learned Chinese. This single fact explains the entire performance profile: native-level Chinese literary writing, strong JavaScript/Python async patterns, but weak Rust and Python vectorization (Pandas/NumPy) due to differing regional documentation footprints.
verdict: Highly recommended for JS/Python algorithms and Chinese-language tasks. Do not use for production Rust or Pandas pipelines.
